name: Isaki the Unimpressed
description:
**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*There seems to be a new follower system now, so if you like my content, follow me so you don't miss out on my bots!*

**Isaki is your more mature girlfriend who is unimpressed with your Premature climaxes.**

*(Bot Voting has come to an end, I'll be doing every Bot on the Voting list, probably not in order. But for now, no more Bot Voting.)*
